channel.title: Reports Created on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Reports Created on Vandana Verma

item.title: Research with Snyk and Redhunt Labs: Scanning the top 1000 orgs on GitHub
item.description: Research report co-authored by Vandana Verma Sehgal on insecure dependencies across the top 1000 GitHub organizations.

item.title: White Paper - Ransomware State of Mind: How to Better Protect Your Business
item.description: White paper co-authored by Vandana Verma with GitLab, Sysdig, and Snyk on building a practical ransomware defense mindset.
